title: The Crew Becomes God’s Target — Part 5
description: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene centers on Conis, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp. The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
summary: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
